category_sources: source_facts.description says scriptable browser for web developers; official site says SlimerJS is a scriptable browser useful for functional tests, page automation, monitoring, screenshots, and scraping.
display_name_sources: Official site title and documentation use SlimerJS; source_facts.name is slimerjs.
docs_sources: Official site links to docs.slimerjs.org; documentation index contains manual and API reference sections.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already contains https://github.com/laurentj/slimerjs, so repo is returned as null per instruction.
tags_sources: Official site describes SlimerJS as a Gecko-based scriptable browser for tests, automation, network monitoring, screenshots, and scraping.
